title: tract_classifications_v1 — normalized ngsTracts per-interval classification
description: Typed payload for normalized ngsTracts STEP_TRC_01 output. One row per departure interval with canonical column names + numeric/enum coercion. Column set matches ngsTracts/docs/METHODOLOGY.md §5.1 (22 cols: 19 always, 3 refined_* only when STEP_TRC_02 was run). Produced by 'normalize_tract_classifications' from a staging_tract_classifications_v0 envelope; lineage tracked in envelope.provenance.source_layer_ids. Backs meiosis_atlas product gene_conversion_tracts.v1.

tracts.description: One row per departure interval classified by ngsTracts.

interval_id.description: Stable interval id from ngsPedigree Stage 3; format DEP_NNNNNN (>= 6 digits).

n_sites.description: Informative sites in interval; Stage 3 filters intervals with n_sites < 3.

n_discordant.description: Sites disagreeing with background; must be <= n_sites.

distance_to_nearest_inv_bp.description: bp to nearest inversion boundary; null when no inversions on chrom or no atlas supplied.

prior_log_ratio_co_nco.description: log10(P(CO) / P(NCO)) under the classifier's prior. Positive favours CO.

refined_breakpoint_bp.description: STEP_TRC_02 only: refined CO breakpoint to single-bp resolution.

refined_ci_left.description: STEP_TRC_02 only: left edge of breakpoint 95% CI.

refined_ci_right.description: STEP_TRC_02 only: right edge of breakpoint 95% CI.

manual_review_flag.description: True when the classifier wants a human to look (e.g. inside-inversion call without parent karyotype).

n_dyads.description: Distinct (parent_id, offspring_id) pairs across all tracts.

class_counts.description: Per-class tract counts. Keys are the class enum values.
